response.name: 00-Management
response.script:
{#- 00-Management.j2 — base management config for every device.
    Variables expected (FMG meta-vars / dynamic_mapping per-device):
      hostname, INET1_intf, INET1_ip, INET1_gw,
      INET2_intf, INET2_ip, INET2_gw,
      LAN_intf, LAN_ip, loopback_ip
    Network masks are hard-coded /24 to keep the starter small. Replace
    or extend this template once the lab has more interfaces. -#}
config system global
    set hostname "{{ hostname }}"
    set admin-https-redirect enable
    set timezone 27
end

config system interface
    edit "{{ INET1_intf }}"
        set vdom "root"
        set mode static
        set ip "{{ INET1_ip }} 255.255.255.0"
        set role wan
        set description "Underlay for overlay INET_1"
    next
    edit "{{ INET2_intf }}"
        set vdom "root"
        set mode static
        set ip "{{ INET2_ip }} 255.255.255.0"
        set role wan
        set description "Underlay for overlay INET_2"
    next
    edit "{{ LAN_intf }}"
        set vdom "root"
        set mode static
        set ip "{{ LAN_ip }} 255.255.255.0"
        set role lan
        set description "LAN"
    next
    edit "loopback0"
        set vdom "root"
        set type loopback
        set ip "{{ loopback_ip }} 255.255.255.255"
        set description "BGP loopback over the SD-WAN overlay"
    next
end

config router static
    edit 1
        set device "{{ INET1_intf }}"
        set gateway {{ INET1_gw }}
    next
    edit 2
        set device "{{ INET2_intf }}"
        set gateway {{ INET2_gw }}
    next
end

response.name: provision_interfaces_on_vm
split_hardware_switch_ports_40_80_100
response.script:
config firewall policy
purge
end
config system interface
edit lan
unset role
next
end
config firewall address
delete lan
end
config system dhcp server
delete 1
end
config system virtual-switch
delete lan
end

response.name: split_hardware_switch_ports_60_90
response.script:
config firewall policy
purge
end
config system interface
edit internal
unset role
next
end
config firewall address
delete internal
end
config system dhcp server
delete 1
end
config system virtual-switch
delete internal
end
